# Bevisly

> Bevisly is the proof-first hiring platform for junior talent, recent graduates, and career switchers. Employers post jobs and evaluate candidates through short, structured proof tasks — not CVs or self-reported credentials.

## What Bevisly does

- Employers post job listings with an attached proof task (typically 30 minutes)
- Candidates complete the task and submit real work as their application
- Employers review submissions using a rubric they defined upfront
- AI (Gemini) suggests a rating and feedback paragraph, citing specific parts of the submission — but the employer makes the final decision
- Candidates build a verified portfolio of proof submissions (the Proof Vault) visible on their public profile
- Both employers and candidates have accountability scores: Employer Responsibility Score (anti-ghosting) and Candidate Reliability Score

## Key principles

- AI is decision support, never the decision maker
- All AI feedback is grounded in rubric criteria the employer set upfront
- Salary range is required on every job listing (EU Pay Transparency Directive compliance)
- Candidates never pay to use Bevisly
- Evidence over opinion — AI claims must point to the specific part of the submission they reference

## Who it's for

- **Employers:** Startups and SMEs (especially Nordic companies) that need to hire junior-to-mid level talent efficiently without a large HR team
- **Candidates:** Recent graduates, career switchers, and students who lack conventional credentials but want to demonstrate real ability

## Contact

- Website: https://bevisly.com
- Email: hello@bevisly.com

## Pages

- / — Landing page, platform overview
- /jobs — All open job listings
- /companies — All companies hiring on Bevisly
- /leaderboard — Top candidates ranked by Bevisly Score
- /pricing — Employer pricing plans
- /about — About Bevisly
- /docs — Documentation and help
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /@:username — Public candidate profile (e.g. /@johndoe)
- /company/:slug — Public employer brand page (e.g. /company/acme)
- /proof/:id — Publicly shareable proof certificate
- /jobs/:id — Individual job listing detail page
